title: How strongly should we spread the edit model's internal states?
decision: Reject VICReg weights 0.1 through 1.0 for the curriculum anchor, retain 0.02 only as the rank-safe combination point, and test faithful LDAD as the next causal repair.
plain_summary: All five runs completed and beat persistence, but shuffled actions increased error by only 0.9 to 1.4 percent. Strong VICReg lost 26 to 39 percent effective rank; weight 0.02 lost 5.4 percent and is the only nonzero carry-forward anchor.
